title: 伊利亚出庭作证复仇，奥特曼撒谎铁证，手握70亿称“我不想让OpenAI被毁灭”
description: 刚才，伊利亚上台了！
titleZh: 伊利亚出庭作证复仇，奥特曼撒谎铁证，手握70亿称“我不想让OpenAI被毁灭”
titleEn: Ilya testifies in court for revenge, solid proof that Altman lied, holding 7 billion and saying "I don't want OpenAI to be destroyed"
descriptionZh: 刚才，伊利亚上台了！
descriptionEn: Just now, Ilya took the stand! He testified under oath in Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI: he spent a year collecting evidence of Altman's "systematic lying," compiled it into a 52-page memo, and submitted it to the board. Moreover, he confirmed for the first time that he holds approximately $7 billion in OpenAI shares. Altman is expected to testify as early as Tuesday; the drama is about to unfold.

title: 《参数高尔夫》教会我们关于AI辅助研究的那些事
description: 《参数高尔夫》汇聚了1000多名参与者和2000多份提交作品，在严格限制条件下探索AI辅助的机器学习研究、编码智能体、量化技术以及新型模型设计。
titleZh: 《参数高尔夫》教会我们关于AI辅助研究的那些事
titleEn: What “Parametric Golf” teaches us about AI-assisted research
descriptionZh: 《参数高尔夫》汇聚了1000多名参与者和2000多份提交作品，在严格限制条件下探索AI辅助的机器学习研究、编码智能体、量化技术以及新型模型设计。
descriptionEn: "Parametric Golf" brings together more than 1,000 participants and more than 2,000 submissions to explore AI-assisted machine learning research, coding agents, quantitative techniques, and novel model design under strict constraints.
